query: SELECT t.id, t.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_roles tr WHERE tr.tenantId = t.id) as role_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_rubrics trb WHERE trb.tenantId = t.id) as rubric_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_call_types tct WHERE tct.tenantId = t.id) as call_type_count FROM tenants t;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_roles tr WHERE tr.tenantId = t.id) as role_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_rubrics trb WHERE trb.tenantId = t.id) as rubric_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_call_types tct WHERE tct.tenantId = t.id) as call_type_count FROM tenants t;
